queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default associated with individuals lacking a checking account and their contribution to increased credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Investigation into the mitigating effect of maintaining critical or other existing credit accounts on default probability and credit risk drivers.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance between 0 and 200 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between a checking account balance ranging from 0 and 200 DM and its contribution to elevated default probability and credit risk drivers.
